# yii3-feature-flags

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-feature-flags
```

## Rules

- Stateless core. Storage backends are separate packages.
- Deterministic rollout: `sha256(salt . ':' . subjectId)`, first 8 hex chars → bucket % 100.
- Kill switch overrides all rules, including forced values.
- Forced values are context-scoped, apply only to existing flags, and do not override a kill switch.
- Unknown flag returns `false` in non-strict mode, throws `UnknownFlagException` in strict mode.
- Flag name regex: `/^[a-z][a-z0-9._-]*$/`.
- Rollout: 0..100 integer. Out-of-range throws `\InvalidArgumentException` (not `InvalidFlagNameException`).
- `EvaluationResult` is constructed only through static factories; `getReason()` returns an `EvaluationReason` enum.
- `MetricsRecorder` is called exactly once per `evaluate()` (never on the strict-mode throw path).
- Core `config/di.php` binds only `FeatureFlags`. It must not bind `FlagProvider` or `MetricsRecorder`.

## API Reference

### FeatureFlags

Facade service. Main entry point.

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3FeatureFlags\FeatureFlags;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3FeatureFlags\ConfigFlagProvider;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3FeatureFlags\FlagContext;

$provider = new ConfigFlagProvider(flags: [
    'new-checkout' => [
        'enabled' => true,
        'salt' => 'checkout-v1',
        'rollout' => 25,
        'killSwitch' => false,
        'environments' => ['production'],
    ],
]);

$ff = new FeatureFlags(provider: $provider);

// Check if enabled
$ff->isEnabled(flag: 'new-checkout', context: FlagContext::forUser(userId: 'user-42'));
// => bool

// Check if disabled
$ff->isDisabled(flag: 'new-checkout', context: FlagContext::forUser(userId: 'user-42'));

// Detailed result
$result = $ff->evaluate(flag: 'new-checkout', context: FlagContext::forUser(userId: 'user-42'));
$result->isEnabled();     // bool
$result->getReason();     // EvaluationReason enum
$result->getFlagName();   // string

// Check existence
$ff->has('new-checkout'); // => bool

// Strict mode: unknown flags throw
$ff = new FeatureFlags(provider: $provider, strictMode: true);

// Custom metrics recorder (last argument)
$ff = new FeatureFlags(provider: $provider, recorder: $myRecorder);
```

### EvaluationResult

Created only through static factories — constructor is private.

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3FeatureFlags\EvaluationResult;

EvaluationResult::enabled(flagName: 'x');               // enabled=true,  reason=Enabled
EvaluationResult::disabled(flagName: 'x');              // enabled=false, reason=Disabled
EvaluationResult::killSwitch(flagName: 'x');            // enabled=false, reason=KillSwitch
EvaluationResult::rolloutExcluded(flagName: 'x');       // enabled=false, reason=RolloutExcluded
EvaluationResult::environmentExcluded(flagName: 'x');   // enabled=false, reason=EnvironmentExcluded
EvaluationResult::forced(flagName: 'x', value: true);   // enabled=value, reason=Forced
EvaluationResult::unknown(flagName: 'x');               // enabled=false, reason=Unknown

$result->getFlagName();   // string
$result->isEnabled();     // bool
$result->getReason();     // EvaluationReason
```

### EvaluationReason

String-backed enum.

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3FeatureFlags\EvaluationReason;

EvaluationReason::Enabled;             // 'enabled'
EvaluationReason::Disabled;            // 'disabled'
EvaluationReason::KillSwitch;          // 'kill_switch'
EvaluationReason::RolloutExcluded;     // 'rollout_excluded'
EvaluationReason::EnvironmentExcluded; // 'environment_excluded'
EvaluationReason::Forced;              // 'forced'
EvaluationReason::Unknown;             // 'unknown'

$reason = $result->getReason();
$reason->value;                        // string
```

### FlagContext

```php
$ctx = FlagContext::forUser(userId: 'user-42');
$ctx = FlagContext::forTenant(tenantId: 'tenant-1');
$ctx = FlagContext::forEnvironment(environment: 'production');
$ctx = FlagContext::empty();

// Immutable with* methods
$ctx = FlagContext::forUser(userId: 'user-42')
    ->withEnvironment(environment: 'production')
    ->withTenantId(tenantId: 'tenant-1')
    ->withForcedFlag(flag: 'new-checkout', enabled: true);
```

### FlagConfig

```php
$config = new FlagConfig(enabled: true, rollout: 25);
$flag = $config->toFlag(name: 'new-checkout');
```

### Flag

Value object. Created by providers or directly when saving.

```php
$flag = new Flag(
    name: 'my-flag',
    enabled: true,
    salt: 'my-flag-v1',
    rollout: 50,
    killSwitch: false,
    environments: ['production'],
);
$flag->name;          // string
$flag->enabled;       // bool
$flag->salt;          // string
$flag->rollout;       // int (0..100)
$flag->killSwitch;    // bool
$flag->environments;  // list<string>
```

### FlagProvider / WritableFlagProvider

```php
interface FlagProvider {
    /** @return array<string, Flag> */
    public function getFlags(): array;
}

interface WritableFlagProvider extends FlagProvider {
    public function save(Flag $flag): void;      // upsert by name
    public function remove(string $name): void;   // delete by name
}
```

`ConfigFlagProvider` is read-only (implements `FlagProvider` only). `DbFlagProvider`
and `CachedFlagProvider` in `yii3-feature-flags-db` implement `WritableFlagProvider`.

```php
$provider = new ConfigFlagProvider(flags: [
    'flag-name' => ['enabled' => true, 'rollout' => 50],
]);
$flags = $provider->getFlags(); // array<string, Flag>
```

### FlagRegistry

```php
$registry = new FlagRegistry(provider: $provider);
$registry->has('flag-name');  // bool
$registry->get('flag-name');  // Flag (throws UnknownFlagException if missing)
$registry->all();             // array<string, Flag>
```

### MetricsRecorder / NullMetricsRecorder

```php
interface MetricsRecorder {
    public function recordEvaluation(EvaluationResult $result): void;
}
```

- Constructor default of `FeatureFlags` is `new NullMetricsRecorder()`.
- Called exactly once per `evaluate()` (once per `isEnabled()`/`isDisabled()` too).
- NOT called when strict mode throws `UnknownFlagException`.
- Core `config/di.php` does NOT bind `MetricsRecorder`. Adapter packages bind it in their own config.

```php
$recorder = new class implements MetricsRecorder {
    #[\Override]
    public function recordEvaluation(EvaluationResult $result): void {
        // best-effort; never throw
    }
};
$ff = new FeatureFlags(provider: $provider, recorder: $recorder);
```

### Exceptions

- `InvalidFlagNameException` extends `InvalidArgumentException` — invalid flag name format.
- `\InvalidArgumentException` — rollout range violation (0..100).
- `UnknownFlagException` extends `InvalidArgumentException` — flag not found in strict mode.

### Storage backends

| Package | Description |
|---|---|
| `rasuvaeff/yii3-feature-flags-db` | Database (yiisoft/db) + PSR-16 caching + migration; implements `WritableFlagProvider` |

### Yii3 Integration

Package provides `config-plugin` with `config/di.php` (wires only the
`FeatureFlags` facade) and `config/params.php`. Neither `FlagProvider` nor
`MetricsRecorder` is bound by the core — they are bound by exactly one provider:
a storage backend (`-db`) or the application (config-only). Installing a backend
wires `FlagProvider` automatically; do not also bind it manually or you get a
`Duplicate key` error.

```php
// config/params.php
return [
    'rasuvaeff/yii3-feature-flags' => [
        'flags' => [
            'my-flag' => ['enabled' => true],
        ],
    ],
];

// config/common/di/*.php — only for config-only setup (no storage backend)
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3FeatureFlags\ConfigFlagProvider;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3FeatureFlags\FlagProvider;

return [
    FlagProvider::class => [
        'class' => ConfigFlagProvider::class,
        '__construct()' => ['flags' => $params['rasuvaeff/yii3-feature-flags']['flags']],
    ],
];
```
